checks.message: Build provider graph with capability, cost, latency, trust tier, tenancy scope, policy limits, and health state
Add runtime routing engine that can choose providers by lowest cost, highest trust, private-only, fastest acceptable, enterprise policy mode, failover-only, or human approval required

lowestCost.explanation: Capability requested: codegen. Filtered outage providers. Filtered providers with missing or mismatched secrets. Selected lowest-cost route.

enterpriseMode.explanation: Capability requested: codegen. Applied trust floor private. Applied enterprise policy filter: trust >= private and tenancy >= tenant. Filtered outage providers. Filtered providers with missing or mismatched secrets. Selected enterprise-policy route.

fastestAcceptable.explanation: Capability requested: codegen. Applied trust floor standard. Applied cost cap 0.06. Filtered outage providers. Filtered providers with missing or mismatched secrets. Selected fastest acceptable route.

highestTrust.explanation: Capability requested: codegen. Filtered outage providers. Filtered providers with missing or mismatched secrets. Selected highest-trust route.

approvalRequired.explanation: Capability requested: codegen. Applied trust floor private. Filtered outage providers. Filtered providers with missing or mismatched secrets. Human approval is required before runtime execution may continue.
